name: The Five Elders Are at Your Service!!!

issues.description: Effect completely misses the core mechanic: must look at 3 cards from top of deck, reveal up to 1 Celestial Dragons type card (excluding The Five Elders Are at Your Service!!!), add to hand, then trash the rest
Filter is empty/generic (kind:Any). Must specify: cardType=Celestial Dragons AND cardName!=The Five Elders Are at Your Service!!!
Missing trash action for remaining 2 cards after selection
SearchDeck scope incorrect: should look at top 3 cards only (not full deck search), reveal UP TO 1 card (optional reveal mechanic not captured)

suggestedDsl.effectText: Look at 3 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Celestial Dragons} type card other than [The Five Elders Are at Your Service!!!] and add it to your hand. Then, trash the rest.

filter.excludeByName: The Five Elders Are at Your Service!!!
